postgres.note: Replace with your Render PostgreSQL connection string (or local sqlite:// for dev)

github.note: Replace with a GitHub PAT (repo + issues scope)

playwright.note: Browser automation — test UI flows, take screenshots, debug uploads visually

cloudflare.note: Inspect R2 bucket contents, debug upload failures, manage DNS — run 'wrangler login' first

hooks.command: FILE='{{tool_input.file_path}}'; if [[ "$FILE" == *frontend* ]] && ([[ "$FILE" == *.ts ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]); then cd /Users/tomgladney1/familytree/GladneyFamilyTree/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -8; fi || true

Stop.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude finished" with title "Claude Code" with subtitle "Gladney Family Tree"' 2>/dev/null || true
